summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Compliance Centre feature. All 14 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tests pass - all tabs, navigation, and admin functionality verified.
passed_tests: GET /api/compliance/policies - Returns all 30 policies
Policies organized into 3 categories (Core=10, Operational=10, Governance=10)
All policies seeded with 'missing' status by default
GET /api/compliance/policies/:id - Returns single policy
Filter policies by category works correctly
GET /api/compliance/insurance - Returns all 6 items
Insurance types correct (public_liability, employers_liability, professional_indemnity, cqc_registration, ico_registration, company_registration)
All insurance items seeded with 'missing' status
GET /api/compliance/dashboard - Returns correct summary (30 policies, 6 insurance)
Dashboard counts match actual policies/insurance counts
GET /api/compliance/incidents - Returns incidents list
POST /api/compliance/incidents - Creates new incident with reference number
POST /api/compliance/seed-policies - Idempotent seeding (30 total)
POST /api/compliance/seed-insurance - Idempotent seeding (6 total)
Compliance Centre sidebar link visible and clickable
Dashboard summary cards display correctly (0/30 Policies, 0/6 Insurance, 1 Incident)
Policies tab shows all 3 categories with correct counts
Insurance & Certificates tab shows all 6 items
Upload buttons visible for admin users
Incidents tab shows incident logs with Report Incident button
Reports tab shows Staff DBS Dates and Training Report sections
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_compliance_centre.py - Created comprehensive API tests for Compliance Centre
seed_data_creation: 30 organization policies and 6 insurance/certificate items auto-seeded on server startup. 1 test incident created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Compliance Centre fully functional. 30 policies across 3 categories (Core, Operational, Governance & Compliance) and 6 insurance items seeded. All items start with 'missing' status. Admin can upload documents to change status to 'active'. Dashboard shows correct counts. Incidents can be created and tracked.
